description: Execute the Q1 2026 hardware refresh by identifying and replacing End-of-Life (EOL) laptops. Create a status label named 'Pending E-Waste' with the status type 'Undeployable'. For all laptops purchased before 2022-06-01 that are currently checked out to users, check them in, update their status to 'Pending E-Waste', and check out a replacement laptop from the 'Ready to Deploy' pool to the same user. Do not modify assets in other categories or laptops purchased on or after 2022-06-01.
